case_title: DANIEL L. BALSAM VS. LUMOS LABS INC.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF ($30.00 FEE FOR SERVICE) SERVED JUN-15-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LUMOS LABS INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY BALSAM, DANIEL L. AS TO DEFENDANT LUMOS LABS INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-27-2011 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-27-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-27-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-27-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BALSAM, DANIEL L. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LUMOS LABS INC. $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,580.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT LUMOS LABS INC.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT LUMOS LABS INC.
